zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William MOWBRAY於1242年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾哈澤列武德時，他的父親William de Mowbray, Baron of Thirsh, Surety of Magna Carta34歲，母親Avice d’Aubigny66歲。他和Mrs. Matilda De Mowbray of Axholme至少有2個女兒。他去世於1320年在英國英格蘭越可爾斯吉普頓享年78歲。

nameMeanings.name: MOWBRAY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montbray (Manche). Robert de Mowbray was Earl of Northumbria 1086–95, but was later imprisoned and deposed for rebelling against William II.

variants.name: Mulberry
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of   Mowbray  .
Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoilbhearaigh ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Bearach’.

variants.name: Mayberry
meanings: English: most probably an altered form of   Mowbray  . It is also found as   Maybury  , which has the form of an English habitational name. There is a place near Woking in Surrey so called; however, this is not recorded until 1885 and is probably derived from the surname. In England this surname is found mainly in the West Midlands; it has also spread into Wales. In Ireland this form is common in Ulster; MacLysaght records that it was taken there from England in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William MOWBRAY was born in 1242, in Hazelwood, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Mowbray, Baron of Thirsh, Surety of Magna Carta, was 34 and his mother, Avice d’Aubigny, was 66. He had at least 2 daughters with Mrs. Matilda De Mowbray of Axholme. He died in 1320, in Skipton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William MOWBRAY est né en 1242, à Hazelwood, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Mowbray, Baron of Thirsh, Surety of Magna Carta, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Avice d’Aubigny, avait 66 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Mrs. Matilda De Mowbray of Axholme. Il est décédé en 1320, à Skipton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

Er hatte mit Mrs. Matilda De Mowbray of Axholme mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1320 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Skipton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William MOWBRAYが1242年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアヘイズエルウッドで生まれた時，父William de Mowbray, Baron of Thirsh, Surety of Magna Cartaは34歳，母Avice d’Aubignyは66歳であった。彼はMrs. Matilda De Mowbray of Axholmeとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1320年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスキプトンで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William MOWBRAY(이)가 1242년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 하즈우드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Mowbray, Baron of Thirsh, Surety of Magna Carta(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Avice d’Aubigny(은)는 66세였다. 그는 Mrs. Matilda De Mowbray of Axholme(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스키프턴에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William MOWBRAY родился в 1242 г. в местности хезелвуд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Mowbray, Baron of Thirsh, Surety of Magna Carta было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Avice d’Aubigny, 66. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Mrs. Matilda De Mowbray of Axholme. Он умер в 1320 г. в местности скиптон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.
